--- head/science/avogadro/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:32:33 2013	(r317807)
+++ head/science/avogadro/Makefile	Fri May 10 14:33:41 2013	(r317808)
@@ -2,29 +2,33 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	avogadro
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.3
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	science
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Advanced molecular editor and viewer
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2 # (or later)
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgconfig/eigen2.pc:${PORTSDIR}/math/eigen2
 LIB_DEPENDS=	openbabel:${PORTSDIR}/science/openbabel
 
-USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	PYTHON
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=PYTHON
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
+USES=		cmake pkgconfig
 USE_GL=		glu
-USE_QT4=	gui opengl network linguist_build \
-		qmake_build moc_build rcc_build uic_build
-USES=		cmake
+USE_QT4=	gui network opengl \
+		linguist_build moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
 CMAKE_ARGS=	-DENABLE_GLSL=OFF \
 		-DQT_MKSPECS_RELATIVE=share/qt4/mkspecs
-USE_GCC=	4.4+
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	PYTHON
+CFLAGS+=	-idirafter ${LOCALBASE}/include
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
 MAN1=		avogadro.1 avopkg.1
 
@@ -35,9 +39,9 @@ CMAKE_ARGS+=	-DENABLE_PYTHON=ON
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${PYNUMPY} \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sip>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-sip
+LIB_DEPENDS+=	boost_python:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-python-libs
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYNUMPY} \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sip>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-sip
-LIB_DEPENDS+=	boost_python:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boost-python-libs
 PLIST_SUB+=	PYTHON=""
 .else
 CMAKE_ARGS+=	-DENABLE_PYTHON=OFF
@@ -45,6 +49,10 @@ PLIST_SUB+=	PYTHON="@comment "
 .endif
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|share/man|man|' ${WRKSRC}/doc/CMakeLists.txt
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		'/FLAGS_RELEASE/s|^|#| ; \
+		 /PC_FILES/s|$${LIB_INSTALL_DIR}|libdata|' ${WRKSRC}/CMakeLists.txt
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|share/man|man|' ${WRKSRC}/doc/CMakeLists.txt
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
